title: Make interop CI fail closed
description: Review during WIP integration found three existing false-green paths in .github/workflows/interop.yml outside the frame-parser slice: wire-format-roundtrip prints a pending message without Rust validation; Zephyr vector failures are ignored with continue-on-error; failure-reporting omits frame-parser-interop/multinode-simulator and ignores missing bd. Replace placeholders/ignored failures with authoritative checks and complete job dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: Every interop job executes a real assertion or is removed; Zephyr vector failures fail CI; reporting includes all validation jobs and fails clearly when tooling is unavailable; workflow syntax and three reviews pass.
notes: Implementation complete on integration/interop-fail-closed: removed no-op wire-format job and ephemeral bd mutation; enabled cross-impl tests; fixed root vector freshness and Rust integration-test selector; pinned Ubuntu 22.04 with DTC/Zephyr host deps; made native_sim/native/64 link tests authoritative; added least-privilege aggregate interop-status. Local evidence: YAML parse and diff check pass; vector regeneration no-op; Rust shared_vectors 2/2; Python-Rust 2/2 no skips; jq success/failure predicate verified; three final reviews clean. Current main vector suite is 127 pass/1 signed_encrypted failure, fixed by dependency 2auf.35. Remaining Ubuntu execution is 2auf.36.1.
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks 36.1-4 (Zephyr tests, status reporting, Ubuntu deps, authoritative CI)
